/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/splitview.dir/splitview.c.o CMakeFiles/splitview.dir/__/deps/glad_gl.c.o -o ../../../bin/splitview.app/Contents/MacOS/splitview  ../../../lib/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
